text_block_list.text: At the dance studio...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Since I couldn't make it to practice the other day,
I need to make sure I know all the moves before
my next concert.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I've got the song in my head, so can you just
watch me from there?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And turn...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: How was it? Was I on tempo and everything?

Gold City's dance is fantastic. She doesn't miss a
single beat.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: That's good to hear. Well, then...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I saw you enter the studio a few minutes ago, so I
got changed too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: R-right...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer. Stay right there, but help me understand
this—what the heck is Oguri doing?
choice_data_list: Maybe she came to you for some tips?
She came to teach you how to dance!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ah! That's correct.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Our dance instructor says your sense is exquisite
and that I should learn from you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Uhh, well, my method is just repetition and more
repetition. I don't have any "tips," really...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh! So what does that look like in practice?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, my friends send me videos, and I watch and
learn from them in my spare time.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Then the secret is in those videos!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I guess there really wasn't anything special about
your videos or method.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I get that a lot. People are surprised I have
to grind just like everyone else.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but not everybody can keep it up like you.
That's something I could learn from.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Sh-shut up. I heard her just fine.

Afterwards, Gold City spends some time with
Oguri Cap practicing dance moves.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I heard you were probably worried because you
missed practice the other day.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Learning the dance by yourself is really hard. So I
was wondering if I could help.

Unfortunately, Gold City has just finished her
rehearsal.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah. Well then, Oguri. If it's okay with you, I'd love
your help.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's okay. You can never have too much practice.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I've actually been wanting to dance with Oguri as
well.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh! If that's the case...

Somehow I feel more certain than ever that Gold
City owes her constant stream of work to much
more than just her looks.
